scenarios.name: GetScalars
scenarios.description: Read canonical scalar properties from the remote root object.

scenarios.name: CallAdd
scenarios.description: Invoke the canonical add method and verify the numeric result.

scenarios.name: NestedObjectAccess
scenarios.description: Read nested object state and call a nested method.

scenarios.name: ConstructGreeter
scenarios.description: Construct the canonical Greeter target and call greet.

scenarios.name: CallbackRoundtrip
scenarios.description: Pass a callback to the server and verify the callback result round-trips.

scenarios.name: ObjectArgumentRoundtrip
scenarios.description: Pass an object with behavior to the server and verify the server can call back into it.

scenarios.name: ErrorPropagation
scenarios.description: Trigger a remote error and verify the canonical Boom message.

scenarios.name: SharedReferenceConsistency
scenarios.description: Fetch the shared remote object multiple times and verify stable behavior.

scenarios.name: ExplicitRelease
scenarios.description: Verify explicit remote release semantics deterministically.

scenarios.name: AliasRetainRelease
scenarios.description: Acquire the same shared reference twice, release aliases independently, and verify refcount semantics.

scenarios.name: UseAfterRelease
scenarios.description: Release a reference and verify later use fails with a stable released error.

scenarios.name: SessionCloseCleanup
scenarios.description: Verify temporary references return to baseline when session-scoped work is cleaned up.

scenarios.name: ErrorPathNoLeak
scenarios.description: Verify temporary references are cleaned up after an error path.

scenarios.name: ReferenceChurnSoak
scenarios.description: Create and release many references and verify the registry returns to baseline.

scenarios.name: AutomaticReleaseAfterDrop
scenarios.description: Drop the last imported proxy, force GC, and verify eventual remote cleanup.

scenarios.name: CallbackReferenceCleanup
scenarios.description: Verify callback/object-argument temporary references are released after forced GC.

scenarios.name: FinalizerEventualCleanup
scenarios.description: Verify finalizer-driven cleanup completes within a bounded eventual window.

scenarios.name: AbruptDisconnectCleanup
scenarios.description: Acquire remote references, drop the transport abruptly, and verify exporter cleanup through a fresh observer connection.

scenarios.name: ServerAbortInFlight
scenarios.description: Abort the server transport during an in-flight call and verify the client receives the canonical transport-closed error.

scenarios.name: ConcurrentSharedReference
scenarios.description: Use one imported remote reference from multiple concurrent calls and verify consistent results plus clean shutdown.

scenarios.name: ConcurrentCallbackFanout
scenarios.description: Run many callback round-trips in parallel and verify consistent behavior.

scenarios.name: ReleaseUseRace
scenarios.description: Race a remote use against transport teardown and verify either completion or a stable released/transport-closed outcome.

scenarios.name: LargePayloadRoundtrip
scenarios.description: Round-trip a canonical large payload over the full transport and verify fidelity.

scenarios.name: DeepObjectGraph
scenarios.description: Traverse a deep canonical object graph over the transport and verify the nested values.

scenarios.name: SlowConsumerBackpressure
scenarios.description: Delay consumption of a large response and verify the transport does not deadlock or corrupt the payload.
